document_id: Interactive Digital Media Credits (Article 3F) Processed During Calendar Year 2012

findings.description: Alignment of main headings is not preserved.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the four lines of the title block (starting with 'North Carolina Department of Revenue') are center-aligned. In the HTML, they are left-aligned.

findings.description: Loss of bold formatting on procedural notes label.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the text 'Procedural Notes:' at the bottom is bolded. In the HTML, it is rendered in regular font weight.
